title: pheno-context — canonical request context (Context, ContextBuilder, ContextError)
author: forge
summary: Authored the pheno-context standalone crate at pheno-context/ with a canonical request Context struct, builder pattern, and header extraction. Context carries request_id, span_id, trace_id, optional user_id/org_id, and an extensible HashMap<String, String> metadata bag. ContextBuilder exposes with_request_id, with_span_id, with_trace_id, with_user_id, with_org_id, and with_metadata; build() validates required fields. Context::from_headers extracts X-Request-ID, X-Trace-ID, X-Span-ID, X-User-ID, and X-Org-ID from an http::HeaderMap. ContextError is a thiserror enum with MissingHeader(String). Context implements Clone, Debug, and Display (renders as key=value pairs). The crate is registered as a workspace member so cargo test -p pheno-context and cargo clippy -p pheno-context --all-targets -- -D warnings work from the monorepo root. All 5 tests pass.

public_api.pheno_context::ContextError: thiserror enum { MissingHeader(String) } — canonical error for missing required header or builder field
public_api.pheno_context::Context: struct { request_id, span_id, trace_id, user_id, org_id, metadata } — canonical request context; Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Display
public_api.pheno_context::ContextBuilder: builder struct with with_request_id, with_span_id, with_trace_id, with_user_id, with_org_id, with_metadata; build() returns Result<Context, ContextError>
public_api.pheno_context::Context::new: pub fn new() -> ContextBuilder — starts builder chain
public_api.pheno_context::Context::from_headers: pub fn from_headers(headers: &HeaderMap) -> Result<Context, ContextError> — extracts required X-Request-ID / X-Trace-ID / X-Span-ID and optional X-User-ID / X-Org-ID

test_coverage: pheno-context/src/lib.rs: builder_sets_all_fields (line 176) — builder chain sets all required and optional fields, metadata bag
pheno-context/src/lib.rs: from_headers_extracts_known_headers (line 198) — X-Request-ID, X-Trace-ID, X-Span-ID, X-User-ID, X-Org-ID parsed correctly
pheno-context/src/lib.rs: clone_preserves_all_fields (line 229) — cloned context is equal to original via PartialEq
pheno-context/src/lib.rs: display_renders_key_value_pairs (line 245) — Display output contains request_id=, span_id=, trace_id=, user_id=, org_id=, metadata= key=value segments

verification.cargo_clippy: clean (no code warnings, -D warnings applied) via cargo clippy -p pheno-context --all-targets -- -D warnings from monorepo root
